feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: procedure for the BAPI/FM to change the equipment bom for ibo2 t-code
entry.content:
dear experts.

what i want to convey is i want to change the existing item component and to add the item  component for equipment. is there any BAPI/FM for this . if there then what is the procedure for that.

i have upload the picture for to understand the question of mine.

entry.title: BADI alternatives for various Sales and Distribution(SD) related Processes/Transactions if any
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

As evident from the subject we are looking for BADI alternatives for various Sales and Distribution(SD) related Processes/Transactions, preferably Cloud compatible. In the nutshell we are seeking guidance on alternatives for SAP-World famous EXITS like MV45AFZZ, MV50AFZ1, RV60AFZZ etc. if any.

I have seen many related questions on this like Sales Order Creation - BAdi for S/4HANA Public Cloud where they are suggesting to use SD_SLS* related BADIs like SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD, SD_SLS_MODIFY_ITEM etc. But these BADIs are Custom Fields and Logic specific meaning they are only for manipulating the fields added using Custom Fields Extensions and hence only those fields are available as CHANGING parameter,

I have tried my level best searching inside the Enhancement Spot ES_SD_SLS_EXTEND for this but couldn't come up with anything fruitful. 

Hence, requesting suggestions here from all gurus on this, or if nothing is available yet does that mean we are still good to use those above mentioned Godfather USER-EXITS 😉 and stick with Tier3 Extensions for such scenarios?

Thanks,

Sijin

entry.title: Set nobinpt via bdc_transaction (SAP standard form for bdc)?
entry.content:
I want to set nobinpt so that it does not get set as X when the BDC report is getting called. Currently, we are using bdc_transaction because we are also skipping the initial screen of PA30. Now, in this, we cannot set nobinpt so, I tried to set this via ctu_params and use the following instead of bdc_trasaction. 

CALL TRANSACTION ‘PA30’ USING bdc_data OPTIONS opt MESSAGES INTO mess tab.

now, the issue is that binpt is getting properly set, but the initial screen is not getting skipped, even though I have mentioned it properly in bdcdata.

Any suggestions on how to achieve this would be appreciated.

entry.title: Z*field Entries keep missing frequently in a STD SAP Table
entry.content:
Hi,
I am having some Z*fields like ZDATE1 & ZDATE2 type DATUM in a STD table ETTA.
I update the fields with some entries & saving and they keep disappearing frequently after few days.
So i have to use SE16N in debug mode to enter those 1000 entries again & again to those Z*DATE fields.
Can any one tell me why those values keep disappearing after few days?

entry.title: Removing horizontal scroll bar from SAP GUI Screen
entry.content:
Hi,

In SAP GUI screen, for one of the field we have search help, once we select value, then there is horizontal scroll bar coming up on screen. After selecting value, still it persist on screen. This scroll bar seem to be unnecessary. How we can remove this scroll bar??

 

Thank You

entry.title: How to get registered object information from an ABAP program in Developer Extensibility
entry.content:
Hi Exparts,

We are developing custom programs using Developer Extensibility in S/4HANA Public Edition.
We would like to develop programs to perform specific common operations on multiple custom tables.

In such cases, with Classic Extensibility, we could develop flexible functions by dynamically retrieving information from standard tables beginning with "DD".

I cannot find an alternative in Developer Extensibility, so if anyone has any information, please let me know.

Our specific need is to create a program that accesses information that was previously available from tables like:
- DD02L
- DD02T
- DD03L

Please let me know if there are ways to access via CDS views, standard classes, etc.

I would also like to refer to any materials that summarize how to retrieve various registered objects from ABAP programs, if there is one.

Best Regards,
Megumi Inoue

entry.title: Standard Class for QR Reference Number (QRR) and ISO Creditor Reference (SCOR) Validation in SAP?
entry.content:
I'm working with Swiss QR-bills and need to implement validation for both reference types:

  1. QR-Reference (QRR): a 27-digit numeric reference with a check digit calculated using modulo 10 recursive algorithm. This requires a QR-IBAN.
  2. Creditor reference according to ISO 11649 (SCOR): a 25-digit alphanumeric reference that starts with RF followed by 2 check digits calculated the same way as IBAN check digits. This uses a normal IBAN.

Does SAP provide any standard class or function module that can:

  • Validate existing QRR and SCOR references (verifying check digits are correct)
  • Generate check digits for new references of both types
  • Format references appropriately for Swiss QR-bills

I understand that the customization is determined via T049Q. I'm looking for the most efficient way to implement this validation without creating custom code if standard solutions exist.

Has anyone implemented either or both of these reference types in their SAP system? Any guidance on standard objects or best practices would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: help for to change equipment bom for ib02 t-code
entry.content:
hello experts.

CSAI_BOM_MAINTAIN this function module  is to add the new materials for equipment .

then What about modifying one component that it was created before?

please let me know if any one have worked on this.

thanks&regards.

vikas.t

entry.title: Create and update action in custom table while implementing cloud BADI in S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts, I have implementing a cloud BADI badi_mmim_check_matdocitem in S4 Hana public cloud system using developer extensibility. Since this BADI do not have yeild quantity I have entered while cobnfirming the production order. I want to SAVE the data into custom table and fetch the data again to validate against the quantity.

My question is how should be update a custom table in cloud BADI. I am getting error as Executing "MODIFY <dbtab>" from "CHECK_ITEM" violates transactional contract "FUNCTIONAL".

i am able to create order details but not able to create components using FM alm_me_order_create.

vikas.t

if the function module is exits tell me produce for to achieve this.

please help me.

thanks regards.

vikas t.

entry.title: Create SAP OData Service - SEGW
entry.content:
OData service is a comprehensive solution offered by SAP to create a secure and versatile integration between your SAP system and fiori or other non sap applications. OData (Open Data Protocol) is a protocol that builds on top of the REST framework to define best practices for building and consuming RESTful APIs. OData provides additional features and standards, such as enhanced query capabilities, standardized metadata, and support for different data formats. In SAP, ODATA service is created that can work integrated with the project created in Fiori environment.

Creating an Odata service:

T-Code SEGW:
1- Create (Necessary project and service names are made and created.)
2- Generate (The created service is generated)

 

After these operations, the objects in the network are generated:

Model provider classes:
This is where the names of entities and entities on the Odata side are managed - it can be thought of as a table/structure, so I have models on the Odata side, what can those models be: There may be products, vendors, etc., these have structures, fields. There can be structures where we can create these structures, update these structures, these structures are managed by the model provider class)

Data provider classes:
Operations such as updating the structures on the model provider side, data extraction are controlled, etc.

Extension classes:
If there is an extra operation to be done, these operations are done in extension classes, for example, we can think of user exits, extension operations in bady.

Technical model name:

Model definition language) is required for different objects and techniques for Odata.
Technical service name:

When Odata service is created, this part is added to the service, otherwise the service cannot be used.

Error analysis: T-codei: /IWFND/ERROR_LOG

After Generate, the objects, structures and classes to be generated are displayed in the green colored sections on the right side:

Service activation:
The following t-code to maintain and activate the service we created:
/n/IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE

After this process, we can now use this service.

From this screen we can come back and test to see if our Odata service is working and its basic metadata:

1-

2-

3-

Since we have not yet added a structure or other pattern to our metadata, no structure or field pattern will appear in the metadata.

We create a table to be added to our metadata:

Create an Entity type:
Go to the SEGW screen and right click on the Data Model folder, give Entity name and add the structure to be used:

With Medata, the fields of the structure to be used for metadata are specified:

In data exchange, there must be a key for the Entity type, which field is key is specified on this screen, while determining the key field, the way the table on the SAP side holds data and key fields are taken as basis:

With next to next operations we create the Entity type and Entityset:
After that, we re-generate our project so that the related classes and methods can be created.

Mapping operations of RFCs:
Function group is created
Create, Get, Get_list, Delete and Modify RFCs functions are created under the related Function group:

Now that our RFCs are created, we can map our RFCs to our ODATA service appropriately.

In another way, we can do this in data provider clusters (ext's), but we choose RFC mappings in this project because it is more practical and easier to manage the process.

Note:
Actually, we can write the codes we want in the relevant methods (EXT parts) of the Entity without adding RFC, when we right click on the method and say redefine, the parts where we can write code directly open. But I do not recommend it, it is not practical, creating with RFC is a more practical and more manageable method.

RFC Mapping is done by mapping the relevant RFCs to the processes in the service implementation section.
Right click, map data source and then propose mapping:

Sometimes it may not do it automatically, we may need to drag and drop from the data source section.
Key fields should be mapped as both input and output.

When we check again on the gateway side, we can see that the Entity set has arrived in the metadata:

With the Add Uri options button, when we select &metada, we can now see our fields in our metadata structure and in the metadata we can see information such as Entity, Metadata version, key fields etc:

As a result, our ODATA service on the SAP side is ready, now you can go to the Fiori environment and call our ODATA service, using the SAPUI5 library, you can integrate your SAP system with your Fiori application, thanks to this integration, you can securely manage your front end and backend data flows, you can create your necessary reports in the WEB environment using SAP data and you can perform your related CRUD operations with your Fiori applications.

- Finish-

I hope it has been useful for you.
Thank you for your time.

entry.title: Table KNVI ( Customer Master Tax Indicator ) getting updated with extra irrelevant rows
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

Table KNVI ( Customer Master Tax Indicator ) getting updated with extra irrelevant rows ( junk data ) for a particular customer once is few months not regularly.  What might be the reason for this ? 

Would be grateful for your replies. 

Thanks,

Devendra

entry.title: How to create a line chart in R3
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm looking for a solution on how to create a line chart in R3 system. Are there any classes/interfaces etc. that you can recommend?

Best regards,
Cassandra

entry.title: Having an issue calling BOPF multi Node instance ACTION via OData Model Functionimport
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

we have a scenario to call a BOPF Multi Node Instance Action(Approval) for the Invoices from FIORI List report application, we were successfully able to use the ODatamodel FunctionImport method for the single node BOPF->CDS View instance however when trying to use the MultiNode instance of the BOPF action, end up into error, Kindly guide what would be the best way to have the ODatamodel function Import method handling Multi Node Instance BOPF action.

entry.title: Table SWWUSERWI vs FuMo SAP_WAPI_CREATE_WORKLIST
entry.content:
Hi all, 

We are currently using the Function module SAP_WAPI_CREATE_WORKLIST to get the number of workitems for every user, This is however causing performance issues when executed for more than 50 thousand dialog users one by one. We just need a count of How many Work items a User has to process for every user.

Can we use table SWWUSERWI instead ? I have compared various cases, the number of work items returned by the table and the function modules are sometimes different, can we still use this table ?

or is there any other utility which could return the number of work items per user in one Go for all the users.

Thanks for any useful Hints. 

Best regards

Ketan

entry.title: Material Length - SAP Readiness Check
entry.content:
Hello,

The SAP Note 2215852 described how ABAP code should look in order to be consistent with the new material length. In the Note there is following code example:
"So the adapted code looks as follows:"

DATA: ls_matnr_selection TYPE bapimatram,
        lt_matnr_selection TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapimatram,
        lt_material_list   TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bapimatlst,
        ls_material_list   TYPE bapimatlst.


  ls_matnr_selection-option         = 'CP'.
  ls_matnr_selection-sign           = 'I'.
  ls_matnr_selection-matnr_low_long = 'MAT_A*'.

  INSERT ls_matnr_selection INTO TABLE lt_matnr_selection.

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_MATERIAL_GETLIST'
    TABLES
      matnrselection = lt_matnr_selection
      matnrlist      = lt_material_list.

  SORT lt_material_list BY material_long.

  READ TABLE lt_material_list INTO ls_material_list INDEX 1.

  DATA: ls_material_general_data TYPE bapimatdoa,
        lv_old_mat_no            TYPE bismt.

  CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_MATERIAL_GET_DETAIL'
    EXPORTING
      material_long         = ls_material_list-material_long
    IMPORTING
      material_general_data = ls_material_general_data.

  lv_old_mat_no = ls_material_general_data-old_mat_no_long.

I have created a z-report with this and only this exact code and checked it with the Custom Code Analysis using Variant S4HANA_READINESS and I still receive the same findings (concerning lines 13 & 25) that one gets for unadapted code:

So SAP's suggested fix for these findings has no impact and since it is one of the most common findings, we need another way to fix them, ideally not through pragmas. Any suggestions are appreciated.

Thank you

entry.title: MRP-Type(Dismm) Field usage issue in Structure
entry.content:
Hello All

In custom structure where i have a field DISMM(MRP-type) which is causing an ATC P1 issue 
Short text : SAP S/4HANA Simplification Item SI_PP14: Logistics_PP-MRP - Forecast Based Plann
Note : 3211383
I have used this structure in my report and due to usage of it , i am getting an ATC issue in structure
I want to know how i can deal with this issue, i need a field DISMM in report which has been fetched from marc and displaying to user through ALV i can't remove the field i need it and i am unable to find a solution or else pragmas.
So can anyone who has worked on S4 Hana Migration help me out 

Thanks in Advance

#ABAP #S4 Hana #MRP Type #ATC #CCA  #SAP Technical  #MRP #dismm

entry.title: Sales Order Enhancement using Clean core approach using RAP
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We want to determine tax at the line item level. Whenever we are creating or changing any line item data we want to trigger a logic to determine tax. We have already checked the blog From User Exits to RAP: Adopting a Clean Core Appr... - SAP Community but no event is triggering at the time of changing the data of line item before saving. Is there any other clean core approach which we can utilize for the development instead of user exits?

Any suggestions are helpful!

Thank you!
